summary: Tested all backend endpoints (18/18 passed) and frontend flows for Pražské Hospody MVP. Backend: pub count=143, filters by district/beer/q work, sort by rating works, random/featured/nearest/districts/beers/stats work, review CRUD + validation (422 for score 0/6) all pass. Frontend: home page renders hero + featured grid, random pub nav works (slot animation → /hospody/:id), directory filter Žižkov yields 10 cards, review submission shows reviews-list, nearest district filter loads results, favorites grid works, stats page shows districts/beers/top-rated, all nav links visible. Crawl page test inconclusive due to test script URL-building bug (kept page.url stale after /blizko nav), but routes are wired in App.js.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated; consider lifespan handler (non-blocking).
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' when env not set — fine for preview but tighten for prod.
Featured fallback uses fixed Random(42) seed → deterministic 'random' fillers; acceptable but worth noting.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (crawl page not fully exercised by automation; routes exist)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 review on pub_id=1 (nickname TEST_pivař, score 5) and 1 review on pub_id=2 (nickname TEST_E2E, score 4) during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 districts present, 143 pubs verified. Reviews persist in Mongo. Crawl page (/tah) routes wired; PubCard exposes add-crawl-btn-{id} and favorite-btn-{id} — visually confirmed in directory. Test creds: n/a (no auth).
rca of the issue: No production issues found. Test-script side: page.url-based URL building broke after navigating to /blizko (split('/hospody')[0] returned full URL), causing /blizko/tah requests. Should use a fixed BASE_URL constant in playwright scripts.
